name: Alex Champa
summary: Program Manager specializing in fraud prevention, account takeover mitigation, and operational risk analysis across large-scale digital ecosystems. Experience building detection workflows, improving operational efficiency, and analyzing bad actor behavior patterns.

responsibilities: Serve as Subject Matter Expert for Account Takeover (ATO) detection and mitigation strategies
Monitor and analyze high-risk activity across customer ecosystem in real time
Develop and refine fraud detection workflows to improve identification of bad actors
Lead operational initiatives to reduce backlog and improve case resolution efficiency
Provide investigative support and risk analysis for complex fraud cases
Collaborate with engineering and operations teams to implement control improvements
Analyze fraud trends and translate findings into actionable prevention strategies
achievements: Reduced backlog of 25K+ cases through workflow optimization initiatives
Improved detection efficiency through QA framework implementation
Operationalized fraud detection tooling and risk monitoring processes

projects.name: Backlog Elimination Initiative
projects.description: Reduced 25,000+ case backlog through process redesign and prioritization modeling.
projects.impact: Improved operational throughput and case resolution speed

projects.name: QA Framework Build
projects.description: Designed and implemented quality assurance framework for fraud review processes.
projects.impact: Increased consistency and accuracy of fraud decisioning

projects.name: Pindrop Operationalization
projects.description: Integrated and operationalized third-party fraud detection signals.
projects.impact: Improved fraud detection accuracy and reduced false negatives

projects.name: Magic Links Initiative
projects.description: Implemented secure authentication flow improvements for customer access.

projects.name: Escheatment Review Program
projects.description: Reviewed and processed 10,000+ dormant accounts for compliance and risk exposure.
projects.impact: Improved regulatory compliance and account hygiene

rules: Use strong action verbs: Led, Investigated, Built, Optimized, Reduced, Developed
Must include at least one tool, system, or method (SQL, Splunk, workflows, risk models, cross-functional processes)
Must include a measurable outcome or clearly implied business impact
Each bullet must directly map to a job description responsibility
Avoid generic phrases like 'demonstrated ability' or 'responsible for'
pre_processing_steps: Extract top 3–5 responsibilities from the job description
Map candidate experience to those responsibilities before writing bullets
Align phrasing with target job language and terminology

impact_handling.if_metrics_missing: Infer scale using terms like high-volume, large-scale, enterprise-level, or known figures such as 25K backlog
